subcodes.first_line: The Self-Subsisting hath borne witness that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Best-Beloved, and the Best-Beloved hath testified that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القیوم انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المحبوب و شهد المحبوب انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
